title: Appeal. The Order of the Undersecretary for Licensing and Adjudication
content: 1 denying the Motion to Lift a Closure Order or Motion to Re-open Establishment may be 2 appealed to the Secretary within fifteen (15) calendar days from receipt thereof. 3 Any Motion for Reconsideration shall be treated as an appeal. 4 5
